full_text:
Cell count 1):

total: 2.62 E6

live: 1.68 E6

viability: 64.2 %

size: 10.9 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.06 E6

live: 1.34 E6

viability: 65.3 %

size: 11.8 um

Total cell count: 2.34 e6 / ml (total of 7 mL)

A) RNA/DNA extraction (30 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (12 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 46 wells x 40 µl x = 1840 µl

1500 cells/µl = 1.84E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 950 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 600 uL

cells in medium → 191.2 uL

ome-gel → 134 µl

aprotinin → 2.9 µl

thrombin → 2.9 µl

fibrinogen → 19 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/µl = 6.16E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir

volume to take from cell suspension: 1500 uL

cells in medium → 1414 uL

ome-gel → 493.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 2x 2.34 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

Drops plated on non-cell culture treated 24 well plates (Greiner) to test whether we could avoid cells dropping on the bottom.

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

plate (3): Extra plate

Left-overs from 384-well plate plating were pipetted on 24-well plate as 1000 cells / uL. Total of 12

drops.

Drug treatment conditions (B):

Treatment done on 384-well plate for 25 uL. See plate layout at XX

Next day:

Cultures were occupied with cells. Very large single cells but also multicellular clusters, which were not observed yesterday after dissociation! Clusters were all on the bottom of the wells, so the not cell culture-treated well plate did not make any difference here. Cultures also had some large depri-looking particles.

Drug treatment: 5 mg/mL Pembrolizumab diluted down to 3 mg/mL with PBS 0.3% tween-20: 6uL PBS with 0.75% tween-20 + 9 uL of 5 mg/mL Pembrolizumab

Day 6:

Culture finished.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | 
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | 
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA | RNA

Flow | Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | 
Flow | Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | FFPE
Flow | Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | FFPE
Flow | Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | FFPE
